prompt: Create an ultra-realistic cinematic vertical portrait photo of a stunning 20-year-old East Asian woman surfing in Sanya at sunset, captured from a very low water-level angle close to the front of the surfboard. She is leaning forward on the board with both arms in the water, laughing brightly with eyes nearly closed, radiating joy and confidence. Her dark wet hair is loosely tied back with messy strands around her face, and she wears a soaked short-sleeve white collared knit top over dark bottoms with a small necklace visible. The surfboard nose dominates the lower right foreground, cutting diagonally toward the viewer, while splashing seawater and frozen droplets sparkle around her arms and torso. Behind her is a dramatic tropical sunset with a glowing orange sun near the horizon, golden reflections across the ocean, distant dark hills, and a moody sky blending deep blue, purple-gray clouds, peach, and fiery orange light. Use professional photography realism, intense focus on her smiling face, shallow depth of field, water droplets frozen in mid-air, high dynamic range, natural skin texture, wet fabric detail, cinematic contrast, golden rim light, and an 85mm lens look. Frame as vertical 9:16; avoid text, logos, extra people, or artificial beauty-filter smoothness.
